raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tam Besdeewigam
nelabbi klahsees/ un wiꞥſch ilgi
ne dshwohs/ itt ka Ehna/ ta-
pehz ka wiꞥſch preeksch Deewa
ne bihſtahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weena Neleetiba irr/ kas
Semmes Wirtû noteek. Taifni
irr/ kam ta klahjahs/ itt ka buh-
tu teem to Besdeewigo Darbi/
un Besdeewigee irr/ kam ta
klahjahs itt ka buhtu teem to
Taifno Darbi/ es fazziju: Ir
tas irr Neleetiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz flaweju es to
Preeku/ ka Zilwekam zits Lab-
bums ne itr appaksch Saules/
ka ween ehst un dsert/ un preeza-
tees/ un tas winnam atlez no fa-
wa Darba winna Dshwibas
Laikâ/ fo Deews winnam dohd
appaksch Saules.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad es apnehmohe to
Gudribu afsibt/ un eeraudsiht to
Gruhtumu/ kas wirs Semmes
noteek/ ka Dasch nei Deenâ nei
Irakti Meegu reds ar fawahm
Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad redseju es wiﬀn
Deewa Darbu/ ka tas Zilweks
ne warr isprast to Darbu/ kas
noteek appakch Saules/ jepschu
tas Zilweks darbojahs to iswai-
zaht/ tomehr wiꞥſch to ne dab-
buhs/ un jepschu arridsan tas
Gudrs fazzitn ka wiꞥſch to
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eefcham/ es efimu scho
wiﬀu farwâ Sirdi ap-
nehmis/ ka es scho wiﬀ-
fu skaidri taprastu/ ka tee Taifni
un tee Gudri ar faweem Dar-
beem Deewa Rohkâ irr. Un tas
Zilweks arri ne pasihst nedâ to
Mihlestibu/ nedâ to Eenaidibu
jebkuxras Leetas/ kas winna
Preekschâ irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiﬀas Leetas noteek wee-
nam ta ka wiﬀeem/ irr weenadi
klahjahs tam Taifnam/ un tam
Besdeewigam/ tam Labbam un
Schihkstam/ ka ir tam Ne-
schihkstam/ tik labbi tam/ kas
uppure/ ka kas ne uppure/ tik
labbi Labbam/ ka Grebzineekam/
tam/ kas swehre/ ka ir tam/kas
par to Swehreschanu bihstahe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Schi irr tanna Leeta starp
wiﬀahm/ kas noteek appaksch
Saules/ ka wiﬀeem weenadi
klahjahs/ un ka arri to Zilweka
Behrnu Sirds pilna Blehdibas
irr/ un Trakfoschanas irr win-
zu Sirdis/ kanehr tee dshwo/
un pehz to irr teem jamirst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo preeksch ta/ kaê wehi
dshwo/ irr Zerriba/ jo dshwo
 Suns irr labbaks/ neka nomir-
ris Lauwa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee Dshwi sinna/ ka
teem jamirst/ bet tee Nomirru-
"
    }
  ],
